programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Labria Paige/Laquan Brown
programme.desc: Growing up on the rough and tumble streets of Baltimore, Maryland, aspiring nurse Labria Paige has managed to rise above the odds. But when she reconnects with a bad boy from her past, she gets caught in a family feud that will change her life forever. And in Savannah, a couple risks it all for love when their crime spree takes a deadly turn.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When a woman is found murdered in her own bed, her family is distraught. As detectives probe, they wonder if her death is the result of a budding romance or jilted ex-lover. Detectives will soon uncover a history of abuse and a man out for revenge.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: An aspiring actor�s dreams of stardom are cut short when he�s brutally stabbed at home. Was the killer a new hookup or a bitter ex-boyfriend? The case goes cold after DNA clears several suspects, until new technology leads police to the final act.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.desc: When a carjacking victim succumbs to his injuries a month later, Quinn and Vince must pick up the pieces of a botched robbery investigation. The search for a stolen SUV and a police pursuit leads detectives to the unlikeliest of suspects.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.desc: After the lead detective is reassigned, Quinn and Vince take over a case involving a man found shot to death inside a vehicle. It takes a village to solve the case as rumors spiral into a violent confrontation.

programme.title: Payback
programme.desc: After a jealous ex confesses to committing deadly revenge on his romantic rival, the victim’s family worries he will get away with it because of an inadmissible confession and a circumstantial case.

programme.title: Sins of the City
programme.sub-title: Sins of the City - Sanford, Florida
programme.desc: In 2012, Sanford, Florida would become the epicenter of a nationwide debate when George Zimmerman shoots and kills Trayvon Martin. Trayvon�s death ignites the Black Lives Matter movement and puts Sanford center stage for the trial of the century.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: She was 18 years old, in love, with a bright future ahead, when a single gunshot cut her life short. Despite witnesses, the truth remains shrouded in silence. Was the killing intentional or just a tragic accident? Even when the truth finally comes to light, the victim’s family may never get justice.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A young mother is shot to death in her home while her children are sleeping. Signs of a break in suggest this could be a robbery gone wrong, but clues will soon lead to a suspect driven by greed, sex, money, and fame, who may have killed before.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Donna Roberts/Alisa DeJesus
programme.desc: When Donna Roberts falls for a man half her age, there�s adventure and excitement, in her newfound love. The only thing in their way is her husband. Alisa DeJesus and her man are pregnant and homeless. Desperate, they hail a taxi, but with no money to pay it turns into a drive through hell.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Jennifer Helmedach/Lashonda Williams
programme.desc: In Meriden, Connecticut Jennifer Helmedach falls for a bad boy with a short temper. After money problems, the two decide to rob a friend and it ends in tragedy. Then in Memphis, Lashonda Williams and boyfriend Roger Reed get wrapped in the seedy world of sex crimes that will eventually end in bloodshed.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Keeairra Dashiell/Shameeka Watson
programme.desc: Keeairra Dashiell was your typical girl next door until she met football star, Tyquan Knox; who tackled her heart and convinced her to do the unthinkable. Later, Shameeka Watson�s fiery temper leads her and her husband, Clarence McCord III, to commit a horrendous murder.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Damonica Evans/Jennifer Simpson
programme.desc: Texas duo Damonica Evans and Brandon Daniels are looking for a fresh start, until a get-rich-quick scheme goes awry, landing them in the long arms of the law. Meanwhile, teen Jennifer Simpson�s loving husband ropes her into a heinous crime that changes their small town forever.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Marryssa Middleton/Melanie Costantini
programme.desc: Marryssa Middleton believes she has found the love of her life. But once her lovers true colors are revealed, she�s in too deep to get out. Later, Melanie Costantini moves to Sin City with her high school sweetheart in search of a fresh start. But when the bills pile up, her man sets up a diabolical plan.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Worried parents report their daughter missing, and fear the worst when police find her car abandoned. Forensic evidence leads to suspects with conflicting stories, and investigators navigate the lies to uncover the truth about what happened to her.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: After being robbed just a few weeks earlier, a couple appears to be the victim of a second home invasion that turned fatal leaving one of them dead. But what detectives soon uncover is a string of affairs and possibly a scorned lover�s revenge.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.desc: Quinn and Vince are called to assist after a well-known Atlanta civil servant is gunned down outside his home. Stakes are high as detectives piece together a timeline and chase down a mystery caller.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.sub-title: ATL Homicide - Heather Camp & Nicole Sartell
programme.desc: While working a homicide at an abandoned home, Quinn and Vince discover a second body hidden inside a closet. The investigation quickly leads them on the hunt for a suspect known as �Murder Man.�

programme.title: Payback
programme.desc: After an anti-violence activist is gunned down in broad daylight, investigators uncover a twisted case of vengeance and mistaken identity thanks to wiretaps, cellular forensics, surveillance video, and rumors on the streets.

programme.title: Sins of the City
programme.sub-title: Sins of the City - Cambridge, Massachusetts
programme.desc: The violent murder of 21-year-old Justin Cosby inside a Harvard dormitory basement sends shockwaves throughout the city of Cambridge and ignites a loving mother�s fight to clear her son�s name once the story goes public.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When a homeowner in a troubled Brooklyn neighborhood is gunned down at his front door, police suspect a robbery gone bad. But after the victim’s wife recognizes one of the men seen on security video entering the house, investigators uncover a ruthless murder plot driven by jealousy and greed.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: She was in love and enjoying a life of glitz and glamour, until she became the victim of an unlikely kidnapping turned murder. The investigation reveals that the victim may have had some dark secrets, but the cruel truth will elude police until a shocking clue puts the killer right in their crosshairs.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A young mother is shot to death in her home while her children are sleeping. Signs of a break in suggest this could be a robbery gone wrong, but clues will soon lead to a suspect driven by greed, sex, money, and fame, who may have killed before.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Donna Roberts/Alisa DeJesus
programme.desc: When Donna Roberts falls for a man half her age, there�s adventure and excitement, in her newfound love. The only thing in their way is her husband. Alisa DeJesus and her man are pregnant and homeless. Desperate, they hail a taxi, but with no money to pay it turns into a drive through hell.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Jennifer Helmedach/Lashonda Williams
programme.desc: In Meriden, Connecticut Jennifer Helmedach falls for a bad boy with a short temper. After money problems, the two decide to rob a friend and it ends in tragedy. Then in Memphis, Lashonda Williams and boyfriend Roger Reed get wrapped in the seedy world of sex crimes that will eventually end in bloodshed.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Keeairra Dashiell/Shameeka Watson
programme.desc: Keeairra Dashiell was your typical girl next door until she met football star, Tyquan Knox; who tackled her heart and convinced her to do the unthinkable. Later, Shameeka Watson�s fiery temper leads her and her husband, Clarence McCord III, to commit a horrendous murder.
